subject: Follow-up — The Founders Pod × Kunal Shah
body:
Hi Kunal,

Just wanted to touch base ahead of our recording session scheduled for Tuesday, 25 March at 11:00 AM IST.

Please let us know if you have any questions or would like to share talking points beforehand.

Looking forward to it!

Best,
The Founders Pod

subject: Reminder: Recording this Friday — The Founders Pod
body:
Hi Adora,

Just a friendly reminder that we're recording this Friday at 2:00 PM IST. We've reserved the studio — please confirm you're all set!

Best,
The Founders Pod

subject: Episode topic confirmation — Startup Journey
body:
Hi Priya,

We're really excited to have you on The Founders Pod!

To make the most of our time together, could you share:

  • A short bio (2–3 lines)
  • Key milestones you'd like to highlight
  • Any topics you'd prefer to avoid

Looking forward to a great conversation.

Best,
The Founders Pod

subject: Follow-up — The Founders Pod × Rahul Mehta
body:
Hi Rahul,

We'd love to lock in a recording date soon — please reply with your availability and we'll get something scheduled.

Best,
The Founders Pod

subject: Second touch — The Founders Pod
body:
Hi Sanya,

Just circling back on my last message — I know things get busy! We'd still love to have you on the show. Let me know if a different format (shorter session, video call first) might work better.

Best,
The Founders Pod
